summary: The diff implements a comprehensive personal portfolio website with a Motoko backend and React frontend. Most requirements are addressed, but there are notable gaps: the Project schema in the backend does not include the portfolio-specific fields (Platform, Tech Used, Security Implemented, Role) required by REQ-4; the Skills schema lacks categories required by REQ-3; placeholder/seed data for projects and skills is not visible; the hero background image file is not generated or placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/; and the backend uses Map.empty which may not be stable variables, raising questions about REQ-10's persistence requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Skills section must display categorized skills: Primary (Flutter, Dart), Secondary (React Native), Security (Secure API Integration, Authentication Security, Secure Local Storage, Data Encryption), and Additional (Firebase, REST APIs, Web Development).
missing_requirements.reason: The backend Skill type only has id, name, and experience fields with no category field. There is no evidence of skill categories being stored or rendered in the visible diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each project card must display App Name, Platform, Tech Used, Security Implemented, Description, and Role. Seed with placeholder project data.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend Project type only has id, title, description, url, timestamp, and image fields. It lacks Platform, Tech Used, Security Implemented, and Role fields. No placeholder seed data is visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data must persist across canister upgrades using stable variables.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses Map.empty declarations which are regular heap variables with no visible stable keyword. No stable variable declarations are visible in the truncated backend code, raising concerns about upgrade persistence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a hero background image and load it from frontend/public/assets/generated/.
missing_requirements.reason: No image file is added under frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff. The hero background image hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png is not among the listed added files.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetup component that prompts authenticated users to enter their name and email after Internet Identity login.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any user profile setup flow or profile data collection for visitors or users. This is an added feature not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: UserProfile entity with getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, and saveCallerUserProfile backend methods.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies backend entities as projects, skills, services, testimonials, blogs, leads, and seo_settings only. A UserProfile entity and associated methods were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Social media links for GitHub, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X in the Footer component.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention social media links anywhere in the footer or elsewhere.
